name: Dossie MCP Server
description: Texas TREC real estate tools: calculate residential contract deadlines with paragraph citations, check holiday rollover rules, compare transaction coordinator pricing models, and get Dossie product info.
author: Heath Shepard

tools.name: calculate_trec_deadlines
tools.description: Calculate Texas TREC residential contract deadlines with paragraph citations. Returns earnest money, option fee, option period expiry, survey, financing, and closing deadlines with automatic weekend/holiday rollover per TREC 20-17 ¶ 23.

tools.name: check_texas_holiday
tools.description: Check if a date triggers TREC ¶ 23 rollover (weekend or federal holiday). Returns holiday name, rollover date, and rollover rule citation.

tools.name: get_tc_cost_comparison
tools.description: Compare Texas transaction coordinator pricing models: freelance per-file ($300-700), monthly retainer ($1500-3500), in-house TC ($45k-85k/year), and AI/Dossie ($29/month).

tools.name: get_dossie_info
tools.description: Get Dossie product information, founding member pricing ($29/month locked for life), and links to calculator and guides.
